prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `72207abc`.
codex_response:
Implemented `TASK_ID 72207abc` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_72207abc/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_72207abc/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_72207abc/generator.py#L6). The rule is: take the nonzero colors on the middle row in left-to-right order, keep the existing seed, then continue cycling those colors to the right while the step between successive colored cells increases by 1 each time. I used the summary hint; the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` description matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` or new DSL primitive was needed.

The generator stays close to the observed family: 3-row grids only, width 19 or 29, and left-anchored 2- or 3-color seeds with positions `(0,1)` or `(0,1,3)`. Verification passed on `4/4` official examples and `1000/1000` generated examples, and I visually checked [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/72207abc/previews/preview_01.png).

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/72207abc/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/72207abc/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/72207abc/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/72207abc/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/72207abc/previews/preview_03.png).
